column1: # OWASP ZAP role-matrix baseline rule overrides.
#   action: IGNORE | WARN | FAIL | PASS | INFO
# This scenario runs the same passive baseline scan as the PR DAST workflow for
# each canonical local test user. Keep this close to rules.prodlike.tsv unless
# a role-specific signal is intentionally different.

column3: Strict-Transport-Security only relevant on HTTPS production hosts.
HTTP Only Site only relevant on HTTPS production hosts; CI scans localhost over HTTP.
CSP header tested at the edge proxy, not on localhost CI build.
Permissions-Policy header set by the production proxy.
Timestamp disclosure: noisy on Next.js bundle hashes.
Information disclosure - suspicious comments: noisy in dev source maps.
Non-Storable Content: Cache-Control: no-store is intentional on auth-bearing pages (issue #114).
Modern Web Application: residual /en and /sv locale roots are inherent to the App Router (issue #108); /robots.txt and /sitemap.xml are now served by app/robots.ts and app/sitemap.ts.
Absence of Anti-CSRF Tokens is relevant in role-matrix scans because low-privilege pages must not expose unsafe mutation affordances.
